    Short Bio

    Welcome to my ePortfolio. My name is Beverly Vaughan, and I am a computer science student developing skills in software engineering, algorithms and data structures, databases, computational graphics, and full-stack development. This portfolio highlights selected projects that demonstrate my growth as a programmer and problem solver. Through these artifacts, I show my ability to design, develop, test, and improve software solutions using industry-relevant tools and practices.

    Projects Page

    Thumbnail                        Title                    Short tagline                         Button: View Project

    ​

    Title: Project Name     "ShadowQuest-2D Adventure Game"

     

    Tech Stack: Python * React * AWS

    C++ * Java * Custom Game Engine * 3D Modeling Tools

    Overview:

    ShadowQuest is a 2D adventure game I developed to explore gameplay mechanics, character movement, and interactive storytelling. I designed the core systems, coded the logic, and created custom 3D‑inspired sprites.

     

    ​Problem and Approach:  

    ​Designed a movement and collision system in C++

    Built a simple engine to handle rendering and input

    Created 3D‑style assets to give the game depth

    Implemented enemy AI and item interactions

    ​

    Features: 

    ​Smooth character movement

    Enemy pathfinding

    Inventory system

    Custom 3D‑inspired art

    ​

    Media: Screenshots      Demo video      Embedded GitHub code

    ​

    Reflection Page: Semester reflections   Debugging lessons   Architecture decisions   Ethical considerations in CS

    What I learned From This project

    This project strengthened my understanding of game loops, rendering, and object‑oriented design. I learned how to optimize performance and create assets that blend 2D and 3D styles.

     

    Technical Skills Page:   

     

    Languages: Python * Java * C++ * JavaScript * SQL

    ​

    Frameworks and Libraries: React * Node.js * Flask * Django * TensorFlow* PyTorch

    ​

    Tools and Platforms: Git * Docker * Linux * AWS * Firebase * Azure

    About Me Page

    I’m Beverly Vaughan, a Computer Science student focused on gaming and interactive digital design. I’m currently studying Computer Science at Southern New Hampshire University with a concentration in gaming.  I’m passionate about building technology that creates real world situations. My passion also lies in combining creativity with technical skill to craft immersive digital experiences.

    ​

    Timeline:

    Year 1: Intro to CS, first projects

    Year 2: Dat a structure, algorithms

    Year 3: Advanced coursework, research

    Year 4: Capstone, specialization
